auth.unauthorized: You haven't been invited yet. Please ask an admin to send you an invitation.

hero.headline: Shift Scheduling, Simplified
hero.subheadline: The free shift management tool for restaurants, retail, and event teams. Sign in with Google and start in seconds — no registration needed.

features.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
features.f1_desc: No registration required. Accept an invitation and log in with your existing Google account.
features.f2_desc: When managers update the schedule, it reflects immediately for every team member. No more miscommunication.
features.f3_desc: Save preset shifts and log attendance in one click. Edit actual hours and add notes whenever needed.
features.f4_desc: Summarize work days and total hours in one click. Export to CSV for payroll in seconds.

usecases.title: Trusted by teams like yours
usecases.uc1_desc: Define shift types per role (front-of-house, kitchen). See weekly staffing at a glance on the calendar.
usecases.uc2_desc: Handle peak-season staffing smoothly. Collect shift preferences and finalize schedules on everyone's phone.
usecases.uc3_desc: Create a separate shift table per project. Invite members with a single email address.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes, Shifter is completely free to use right now. No account registration required.
faq.q2: How many people can use it?
faq.a2: There is no limit. Shifter works for small teams and teams of dozens.
faq.a3: Yes. The responsive design works comfortably on smartphones, tablets, and desktops.
faq.a4: Shifter runs on Cloudflare's global edge network and all connections are secured with HTTPS.

footer.tagline: Simple shift management for small teams

seo.title: Shifter — Free Shift Scheduling App for Small Teams
seo.description: Free shift management app for restaurants, retail, and event teams. Sign in with Google, share schedules in real time, and log attendance from any device. No registration needed.
